instruction:
In a certain factory, one team consists of 9 male workers and 5 female workers. If 3 representatives are to be selected, what is the probability that at least one of the selected representatives is a female worker?

Options:
A. 13/16
B. 8/13
C. 9/13
D. 11/14
E. 12/15
F. 7/12
G. 9/14
H. 11/13
I. 10/13
J. 7/10
